text: Have you ever gotten lost in a new city?
I have visited many places, but I still ask locals for help.
Go straight ahead and turn left at the traffic light.
The hostel is on the corner, next to the bakery.
Take the second street on the right.
The museum is across from the church, behind the square.

Okay, straight ahead and then turn right. Is it nearby the main square?
Exactly. Walk two blocks until the roundabout, then take the second exit. The museum is on the corner, across from the church.

Excuse me, how do I get to the square?
Go straight ahead and turn left at the corner.

Hi Tuca, it's Diego. Welcome to the town! Let me give you directions to the place where we will meet. When you leave the bus station, turn right and walk straight ahead for two blocks. You will pass a small park on your left. At the second traffic light, turn left and cross at the crosswalk. Stay on the sidewalk and keep going until you reach the main square. The coffee shop is on the corner, right next to the old bakery and across from the church. The church is a famous landmark, so it is easy to find. If you get lost, just call me and I will come and meet you. See you soon!

Hi everyone, this is Tuca. Let me tell you how to reach my coffee farm. From the town center, drive straight ahead on the main road for about ten kilometers. When you see the old stone bridge, our most famous landmark, turn left. Do not take the roundabout; go past it and stay on the road. After two more kilometers, you will reach a small intersection next to a blue gate. Turn right there and follow the dirt road until the end. My farmhouse is on the corner, right behind the tall coffee trees. If you get lost, stop at the little church and call me. I cannot wait to welcome you!

Tuca leaves the bus station and feels lost. She asks a friendly local named Diego for directions. Diego tells her to go straight ahead and turn right at the intersection. Tuca walks two blocks and reaches the roundabout. She finds the coffee museum on the corner, across from the church.
Excuse me, how do I get to the main square?
Turn left at the second traffic light.
The bakery is on the corner of two streets.
Walk two blocks until you reach the roundabout.
The hostel is next to the old church.
Use the crosswalk to cross the street safely.
Go straight ahead and turn left at the corner.
The cafe is across from the church, next to the bakery.
I think I'm lost. Can you help me?
Excuse me, how do I get to the square?
